category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes tgenv as a tool to manage multiple Terragrunt versions.
source_facts.description says it is a Terragrunt version manager inspired by tfenv.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title uses tgenv/tgenv.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo both point to the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/tgenv/tgenv, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists tgenv as a command-line executable.
